tspan.tspan: Receives ARC BAR Out and advances STP-8 to the

text.tspan: Sets the tonal center and mode of the secuence

tspan.tspan: Each step stores an octave and degree value
relative to KEY / MODE. SLEN sets how many
steps are active in the sequence. Step ON/OFF
controls whether a step sends its octave/degree
value; disabled steps remain in the sequence
timing but output no new pitch value. PLAY MODE
changes how the active steps are read: Forward,

text.tspan: Sets the octave range used by Auto Fill.

tspan.tspan: 0 mutates on each FILL press. Fixed values repeat
the same fill. With SEED 0, the contextual menu

text.tspan: can mutate automatically after each cycle
